# Security policy

JEM is a static data + web visualization project. There are no user accounts, secrets in the public dataset, or server-side application code in this repository.

## Reporting

- **Data integrity / malicious PRs:** Open a private security advisory on GitHub (once the repo is published) or email the maintainer listed in [`jem/docs/TEAM.md`](../jem/docs/TEAM.md).
- **friedso.com hosting:** Contact the site operator (`@dso6060`) — not handled via this repo's co-maintainer by default.

## Scope

In scope: tampered YAML intended to misrepresent institutional facts, compromised GitHub Actions workflows, dependency supply-chain issues in `scripts/requirements.txt`.

Out of scope: Disagreement with structural interpretation of law (use contested-fact process instead).
